mapper.sql:
WHERE t.deleted = 0
AND (t.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.code, t.name, t.remark, t.sort, t.status, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dict_data d WHERE d.type_code = t.code AND d.deleted = 0) AS dataCount FROM sys_dict_type t
ORDER BY t.sort, t.id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.id, t.code, t.name, t.remark, t.sort, t.status, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dict_data d WHERE d.type_code = t.code AND d.deleted = 0) AS dataCount FROM sys_dict_type t WHERE t.id = #{typeId} AND t.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dict_data WHERE type_code = #{typeCode} AND deleted = 0
